name: HRC_SEM_INT_JOBS_I18N
description: This table is to store job data which might be localized (NOT MLS).

columns.Name: INTERNAL_JOB_I18N_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary column of the Internal Jobs i18n table.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the Job ID referenced to the Internal Job table.

columns.Name: LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language into which the contents of the translatable columns are translated.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_TITLE
columns.Comments: This column contains the requisition title.

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the job family name.

columns.Name: JOB_FUNCTION_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the job function name.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the organization name.

columns.Name: SHORT_DESCRIPTION_CLOB
columns.Comments: This column contains the short description clob.

columns.Name: LONG_DESCRIPTION_CLOB
columns.Comments: This column contains the long description clob.

columns.Name: IS_ERROR
columns.Comments: This column indicates if there is an error in the indexing event.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: This column contains the error message of the indexing event.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
